name: Scotland - Median income (£50,000)
description: Scottish taxpayer earning £50,000 - in the Scottish Higher rate band (42%). Pays approximately £1,496 more income tax than rest of UK at this level.

sources.description: Manual calculation using Scottish 2026/27 tax bands. Cross-checked with Scottish Government factsheet comparison table showing -£1,496 vs rUK at £50k.
